title: Phase 004 — Skill Advisor First-Action Mandate (render.ts strengthening)
description: ADAPT XCE's static 'ALWAYS use X FIRST' steering pattern to dynamic skill_advisor brief. Strengthen render.ts from suggestion ('use ${label}') to mandate ('MUST invoke ${label} FIRST — ${hint}') with per-skill FIRST_ACTION_HINT map. ~30 LOC, single render.ts edit, no scorer changes. Lowest effort highest impact phase — ship first.
